digest.component_or_area: plan-review verification kernel (Pass 2/3 grounding + DET floor + operator-attested AC handling)
propositions: A blocking finding with a false absence premise survived Pass-2 and blocked, while a sibling advisory in the same verdict quoted the provision the block claimed absent.

Add two abstain-safe verifier binaries claims_absence and absence_confirmed_in_context, and a Pass-3 deterministic veto dropping findings where claims_absence=yes and absence_confirmed_in_context=no, keeping impact_plan/pass3 math byte-unchanged.

Add a DET-tier hygiene backstop that drops subject-less DET findings at the DET emission/aggregation point, never touching LLM-tier findings; audit confirms P5 task-dag already names path+ticket subjects.

Detect the [operator-attested] AC tag deterministically and inject it into severity_attributes, clearing the ac_unverifiable hard-override contribution upstream so tagged ACs are not penalized for lacking in-session proving commands.
E2/F1/E6 rubric prompts and one new non-prescriptive coach move gain ADR-0043 attestation vocabulary conforming to the locked MOVE_REGISTRY contract.
Comment-trail consultation is an explicit non-goal to avoid a self-refutation channel the completion verifier defends against.
